about.title: About Me
about.developer: Developer, tech enthusiast, and Bogotá native
about.welcome: Welcome to BogDev! I'm a software developer passionate about AI, Linux, and building great software. This blog is where I share my thoughts, tutorials, and experiments on topics that interest me.
about.bogotaBased: Based in Bogotá, Colombia, I've been working in software development for several years, focusing on web technologies, cloud infrastructure, and now exploring the exciting world of AI.
about.aiDescription: Exploring ML, LLMs, and AI applications
about.linuxDescription: My journey with Linux and FOSS
about.feelFree: Feel free to reach out to me on social media or check out my open source work:
